name: HeyGen
what_it_does: AI video generation API for creating talking-head avatar videos from text scripts or audio, supporting custom avatars, voice cloning, and multilingual video generation for marketing and training content.
use_cases: Automated personalized video generation (e.g., AI sales rep explaining products to each prospect)
Training and onboarding video production from written content without human recording
Multilingual video localization — generate the same video in 40+ languages from one script
News or summary video generation where an AI avatar reads generated text
Content marketing automation — agents generating explainer videos from product data
not_for: Creative/artistic video generation without a talking head (use RunwayML)
Real-time video generation — rendering takes minutes
Applications where authenticity must be disclosed (deepfake disclosure laws vary by jurisdiction)
best_when: You need automated talking-head avatar videos with realistic lip-sync and voice at scale, particularly for multilingual content or personalized video outreach at volume.
avoid_when: You need artistic or action video generation, or your use case requires real-time rendering.

auth.notes: API key in X-Api-Key header. Keys scoped to account. Enterprise plans may have additional permission controls.

pricing.paid_tiers: Creator from $29/month (15 credits); Team from $89/month; Enterprise with custom pricing
pricing.notes: Credit-based system where each video generation costs credits depending on length and quality. API access available on all paid plans but rate limits vary.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrent video limit depends on plan; queue-based rendering

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: API documentation is functional but not comprehensive. Error messages are basic HTTP codes with short descriptions. Rendering failures are not always clearly explained.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Video generation creates new videos each call. Video IDs can be used to retrieve previously generated videos.
known_agent_gotchas: Rendering takes 2-5 minutes per video — agents must use webhook or polling pattern
Avatar selection requires knowing avatar_id — must first call list avatars endpoint
Voice ID also requires separate lookup — no default voice per language
Generated video URLs expire — agents must download videos promptly after generation
Free tier videos include HeyGen watermark — requires paid plan for clean output
API rate limits are not clearly documented — enterprise accounts have priority queue access
Ethical/legal considerations around AI avatar usage vary by jurisdiction — plan for disclosure requirements
